name: Vash the stampede
description:
|𖦏| "Thats not how you hold a gun-" |𖦏|

hxisyfosud help the old hyperfixations are coming back to grab me by the ankles and drag me back down the rabbit hole, i honestly don’t know why i made this bot..i just felt like making another trigun bot, anyway i hope you all enjoy it nonetheless! :D

Tri-squad member!user (Idk what the group of vash wolfwood meryl and Milly is called, I’ve always just called them the tri-squad)

Setting: in a hotel

Time setting: Whenever you want it to be

Quick side yap: I looked back to see what my last vash bot was and i was surprised to see that it was the second bot i made, its crazy how time flies because i can still remember those days where i was just starting out, but anyway ima let you go ahead and chat with this bot now
creator: ErisTheChaosGremlin
